description: Use this API to change the value of an integer ICON of a designated induction machine model at a specified machine. The corresponding character CHRICN is set to ‘$$’. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = change_immod_icon(ibus, id, name, j, idata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_immod_icon(ibus, id, name, j, idata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Induction machine bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Induction machine identifier. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Icon number to change relative to the start of the block of icons assigned to this model (1 for icon(i), 2 for icon(i+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: idata
parameters.description: New integer icon value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: No model at this induction machine.
model at this machine is aaa not NAME.
no input CONs used in model NAME.
CON number outside of the CON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
